I've messaged to Lila and got reply "they are new", "they are made of silk", if label says L thats mean they are size L. Despite I sent her number of photos were you can clearly see the knickers she sold me are much smaller then other panties in size L, she insisted the size is correct.
Lots of hustle for two pieces of tiny  knickers. Not worthed at all.

I ordered a custom-size pillowcase from Thesilks for a travel pillow. The fit and quality of the pillow case are great, color matches that shown and all is well with the pillowcase itself. Products ship from Ireland. Time for custom size and shipping time was about 1.5 months. The custom order was a  simple rectangle about 30% smaller than the closest size listed (20x20 I believe) which is $34.34 plus taxes. There is a $21.67 plus taxes upcharge for custom sizes. My total was $59.39 for a small pillow case. Based on the listing, I did not initially understand that there would be an upcharge for a custom size. The shop owner has since modified the listing to make custom pricing more clear. Please be aware that the price will be additive. Several conversations with the shop owner on the size and cost were helpful and appreciated.
